command: mfs search "persist multi-dimensional numerical array rasterized picture disk" --all --top-k 10
observation: Semantic search returned several image-related candidates, including array/image transformation utilities.
why_it_mattered: The first search explored the behavioral meaning of the query rather than only exact symbol names.

command: mfs search "save numpy array as image file to disk" --all --top-k 10
observation: The refined query surfaced the TIFF helper, confirming it was a tempting adjacent candidate.
why_it_mattered: The agent kept the false-positive family visible while continuing to verify the implementation target.

observation: The compact outline showed both make_grid and save_image in torchvision/utils.py.
why_it_mattered: Browse exposed the expected function name without reading the whole file.

observation: The line range showed save_image taking a tensor, building an image grid, converting through PIL, and saving to filename.
why_it_mattered: This verified that the candidate matched the behavioral query, not just the surrounding image domain.

observation: The MFS-enabled run returned the expected TorchVision file.
why_it_mattered: It found the right file with 5 turns and 610 token usage.
